name_en: Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
name_cn:
Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and edges meet 100% authentic raw materials.
Medium BOOK TOTE Handbag, the most popular size.
Exclusive counter-quality, exclusive ZP surplus stock, exclusive real-life photos.
Exclusive first release on the web.
.
This Book Tote handbag is inspired by Creative Director of Women's Wear Maria Grazia Chiuri and is a flagship product embodying Dior aesthetics.
.
The small size is fully decorated with blue Oblique print, featuring a prominent "Christian Dior" logo on the front, making it an ideal choice for carrying various daily items.
.
The elegant design highlights Dior's exquisite craftsmanship and can be cleverly paired with small accessories like the Mitzah silk scarf.
.
Front "Christian Dior" logo
Can be carried by hand or over the shoulder
Dimensions: 36.5 cm x 28 cm x 17.5 cm
Includes dust bag
.
*Personalized monogramming available for an additional fee
